ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active (for sale) or not */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer */,
  "preferred_categories" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred categories */,
  "email_subscription" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to email notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was last updated */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was last updated */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant (if applicable) */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been approved for display */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "popularity_data" TEXT /* Popularity data as a comma-separated list of ratings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the popularity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the popularity record was last updated */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the popularity data (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the product was viewed */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the product was clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_popularity_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer, vendor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (comma-separated list) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was last updated */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the primary image for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., color, size) */,
  "variant_price" TEXT /* Price of the variant */,
  "variant_stock" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the variant was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variant is the default variant for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
